finding_results.notes: Rephrased June's boundary messages with college-specific context markers and younger, adaptive text cadence while preserving firmness. Nora's line remains deadline/finance-clinical, so the two directive voices are no longer interchangeable.

summary: June and Nora now separate cleanly in pressure dialogue: June's boundary language is campus-text specific and age-marked, while Nora remains procedural and deadline-driven.
